Crosby of Crosby Stills, Nash and Young visited Kent State in 2017 to tour the May 4 Visitors Center. During his tour, he talked about the May 4, 1970 shootings at Kent State and how the tragedy led to the band's iconic song, "Ohio."

David Crosby and 'Ohio' at Kent State

Kent State
Jan 20, 2023
